needs.explanation_en: Temperature adjusts the entire probability distribution but does not meet the requirement for 'cumulative probability-based selection'.
Max tokens only limits generation length and does not relate to the quality of word selection or hallucination prevention.
Correct answer. Top P (nucleus sampling) dynamically selects candidate words based on cumulative probability, maintaining expertise and consistency.
Top-k selects a fixed number of top words, not dynamic control based on cumulative probability.
Encryption addresses Confidentiality, and redundancy addresses Availability. These are not the definitions of access control and integrity.
Correct answer. Access control manages who accesses resources, while integrity ensures data has not been modified.
Bandwidth limiting is unrelated to access control, and edit permissions relate to access control, not integrity.
Log collection is part of auditing, and confidentiality is a separate CIA triad attribute from integrity.
Amazon Bedrock supports Provisioned Throughput pricing options in addition to on-demand. Provisioned Throughput is required for fine-tuned models.
Fine-tuned models are available only in Provisioned Throughput mode and do not support on-demand mode.
Correct answer. Fine-tuned models operate exclusively in Provisioned Throughput mode, ensuring stable performance.
Amazon Bedrock's fine-tuned models are managed as AWS-managed services and cannot be downloaded locally or deployed on premises.
Medical image analysis requires computer vision models, which do not align with RAG's text search approach.
Predicting personal treatment outcomes requires supervised learning prediction models, which differ from document search-based RAG.
Improving conversation style requires fine-tuning, while RAG is specialized for document search-based answer generation.
Correct answer. Retrieving relevant information from existing documents to generate evidence-based answers is the core strength of RAG.
Incorrect. Data type selection and ML algorithm choice are independent.
Incorrect. The explanation is reversed. Tokenization is fundamental to text processing, while missing value handling is needed for structured data.
Correct answer. This accurately explains the differences between each data type and their corresponding feature engineering approaches.
Incorrect. Scaling alone cannot convert unstructured data into numerical values.
